## Pull Request Checklist

Thank you for contributing to the DigitalBulwark Arsenal! Please review this checklist before submitting your PR. 

- [ ] I have read the [Contributing Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My cheat sheet or snippet has been tested and verified to work.
- [ ] I have included GitHub Markdown alerts (e.g., `> [!WARNING]`) if my command carries risks (like deleting data or triggering IPS bans).
- [ ] My commits follow the Conventional Commits format (e.g., `docs: add new payload xyz`).

## Summary of Changes

*Briefly describe the snippet(s) you are adding. What problem does it solve in a real-world DevSecOps or Pentesting scenario?*

## Type of Change

- [ ] 📝 Documentation / New Cheatsheet
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (Fixing a broken command)
- [ ] 🚀 Enhancements (Adding a better flag to an existing snippet)

## Related Issues (Optional)

Fixes #<issue_number>
